title: Kreidler Announce New Album Schemes: Hear “Marble Upset”
author: Chris DeVille
summary:

The post Kreidler Announce New Album <em>Schemes</em>: Hear “Marble Upset” appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
Kreidler are the Berlin/Düsseldorf-based trio of Thomas Klein (percussion, drums, found sounds), Alexander Paulick (fretless bass guitar) and Andreas Reihse (synthesisers, electronics, field recordings). They've been at it for years, and they have a new batch of electronic soundscapes on the way. 

Schemes is dropping in May on Bureau B. Our first preview is "Marble Upset," a pulsing, abstract track that seems ideal for advancing the plot of some high-tech caper. Instead, it's set to a music video by Jörg Langkau, which you can watch below.

TRACKLIST:
01 "Beads"
02 "Klove Twin"
03 "Snowflakes"
04 "Bellboy"
05 "The distance between you"
06 "Looming Large"
07 "Marble Upset"
08 "Via da me"
09 "Fenix" (Feat. Leo Garcia)
10 "Tar"

Schemes is out 5/15 via Bureau B. Pre-order it here.
